name: Graham Russell
abstract: Graham Cyril Russell (born 11 June 1950) is a British musician, singer-songwriter, producer and guitarist of the soft rock duo Air Supply. In 1975, with Russell Hitchcock, he formed Air Supply in Australia.

concerts.label: Air Supply 50th Anniversary Celebration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Don Smedley and Tom Stagg
about_quotes.evidence: Graham Russell and a girl, Ray Whittrick, decided to form a Bunk Johnson Appreciation Society... I joined this with my brother at that time... when Graham Russell came out of the Air Force.
about_quotes.doc_title: Don Smedley and Tom Stagg Interview, 1969-10-03
